calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Payette for and with Richard Yamagami.

The Court asked if counsel had anything to add regarding the jewelry. Mr. Payette stated that decedent told Mr. Yamagami to give the jewelry to his daughters, that the jewelry was not part of probate and that it was appraised. The Court granted the petition to terminate estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order Of Status Hearing [Order To Appear]
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the executor Richard Nobuto Yamagami and the Attorney Steven Payette to appear on August 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not appeared. Sanctions of $25.00 per day will be stayed until that date. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on June 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition to terminate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported)

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Continued To Apr-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Payette for (executor) Richard Yamagami.

Mr. Payette reported that he filed a declaration yesterday, that there are assets of $50.00 in the bank, that there is jewelry that was appraised by Kay Jewelers for $1610.00 but not by the probate referee, that there is a creditor's claim in the amount of $500.00+ and explained how they propose to pay the creditor's claim. The Court stated that it cannot act on a declaration. Mr. Payette stated that they will file a petition within 2 weeks. The status on closing the estate was continued to April 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the petition will be on file prior to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Payette for Richard Yamagami.

Mr. Payette stated that he filed a declaration yesterday, that they discovered that there were zero assets in the bank, that there is one asset recovered from a safe deposit box worth $1500.00, that there is a niece in Massachusetts that got along well with the decedent and that funds had been entered into joint tenancy accounts with the niece, that there had been an account with $34,000.00 in it which was used for assisted living care. The Court stated that a petition to close the estate (termination for lack of assets) needs to be filed. The status of closing the estate was continued to March 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
